title: Companion artifacts for "On the Relationship Between Method-Level SOLID Structural Signals and Code Clone Participation"
author: Roy, Palash Ranjan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
*On the Relationship Between Method-Level SOLID Structural Signals and Code Clone Participation* 
 This archive holds the bulky raw artifacts that drive the SOLID-clone analysis pipeline. After cloning the GitHub repository, extract this archive into the repository root so the paths below land in their expected locations. 
   
 ## How to use 
 1. Clone the GitHub repository: 
 ```bash 
 git clone https://github.com/srlabUsask/SOLID_Association.git 
 cd SOLID_Association 
 ``` 
 2. Extract this archive into the repository root so the paths above merge with the existing tree: 
 ```bash 
 unzip /path/to/solid_clones_zenodo_artifacts.zip -d . 
 ``` 
 3. Follow the reproduction steps in `README.md`. 
   
 ## License 
 All files in this deposit are released under **Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC-BY-4.0)**.
